spec.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, avg(Value) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_sum" WHERE (Attributes['session.id'] != '' ) AND ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.memory.read_events' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.memory.read_duration' ) 
GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.tool.duration' ) AND ( Attributes['tool.name'] = 'memory_search' )
 GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count), MetricName  FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND 
( MetricName = 'openclaw.context.history_tool_size' OR  MetricName = 'openclaw.context.history_user_size' OR  MetricName = 'openclaw.context.history_memory_size'
 OR  MetricName = 'openclaw.context.system_size' OR  MetricName = 'openclaw.context.history_other_size'
 OR MetricName = 'openclaw.context.prompt_size')

 GROUP BY  ses, MetricName, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.tool.duration' ) AND ( Attributes['tool.name'] = 'sessions_spawn' ) 
GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.context.preparation_duration' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) AS score FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.agent.novelty_score' ) GROUP BY ses, time  ORDER BY time ASC  LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' )  
AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.agent.downstream_context_sharing' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes['openclaw.session.key'] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.session.parallelisation_score' )
GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes['openclaw.session.key'] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.session.repetition_score' )
GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, avg(Value) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_sum" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.memory.search_hit' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes['tool.name'] AS ses, avg(Value) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_sum" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.tool.errors' ) AND ( ses != '')  GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, avg(Value) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_sum" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.memory.search_miss' ) 
GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count)  FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram"
 WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.memory.search_fragmentation' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram"
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.memory.edit_duration' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, avg(Value) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_sum" 
WHERE (Attributes['session.id'] != '' ) AND ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND
( MetricName = 'openclaw.memory.write_events' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, avg(Value) 
FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_sum" WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime )  
AND (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.memory.edit_events' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, avg(Value) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_sum" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.tool.calls' ) AND (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' ) AND ( Attributes['tool.name'] = 'memory_search' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.memory.write_duration' ) 
GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000
